'''Dosuun''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Dosuun system/Legends|Dosuun system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. From [[Realspace/Legends|space]], the planet could be seen to possess varied terrain and several seas. It also had at least one area of hilly temperate grassland.

==History==
[[File:DosuunBase.jpg|thumb|left|A Imperial Remnant installation on Dosuun]]
Dosuun remained outside the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was the location of a vast [[Imperial Remnant]] installation in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], run by [[Rax Joris]], who maintained control of the planet using his garrison.

Upon the interception of a transmission in an attempt to track the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], [[Jaden Korr]] headed to Dosuun to [[Mission to Dosuun|investigate]] possible connections between the cult and the Remnant. He was ordered not to engage, but rather to observe. However, upon landing, Jaden was ambushed and taken prisoner by Joris. Jaden escaped, killing many Remnant troops with stolen Imperial weapons, ending with Joris, who had taken Jaden's lightsaber upon his landing.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' incorrectly places Dosuun in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
